untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) momentum divergence confirmation on multiple timeframes, (2) specific reversal pattern structures (double-top, higher-low patterns) across timeframes, (3) market structure changes (break of prior swing high/low), and (4) volume profile distribution/accumulation shifts. These require multi-timeframe analysis, pattern recognition, and volume profile interpretation not available in the allowed indicator set. MACD histogram used as proxy for momentum divergence, but cannot replicate the multi-timeframe structural confirmation requirement.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture momentum divergence using MACD histogram combined with RSI and moving average positioning. However, the core signal logic requires: (a) explicit multi-timeframe comparison (primary vs lower vs higher timeframes), (b) swing point tracking and structural break detection, and (c) volume profile analysis—none of which are available in the indicator list. This is a CONTEXT_DEPENDENT reversion setup that fundamentally requires structural analysis beyond point-in-time indicators.
